background.description: Off-white with a hint of warmth

foreground.description: Deep earthy charcoal for readable text

muted.description: Soft muted tone for inactive/disabled states

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_container: max-w-[1400px] mx-auto w-full px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-72 flex-shrink-0 hidden lg:block border-r border-border bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use gap-6, gap-8, p-6, p-8. Elements should breathe.
layout_and_spacing.profile_customization: CSS Variables applied at the container level (.profile-container) for overriding bg, border, and text colors natively.

components.buttons: rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-[1px] active:translate-y-0
components.cards: rounded-2xl border border-border bg-card shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.inputs: rounded-xl border border-border bg-background px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all
components.verified_badge: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5
components.nav_items: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-foreground/80 hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted/80 transition-colors font-medium

animations.page_load: framer-motion with initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0, duration 0.4s

image_urls.description: Grey and white cat lounging on stool
Cinematic coral pink and mustard gradient texture
Subtle abstract geometric pattern in mustard and coral

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary CTA button text is pure white. Links and primary text must meet WCAG AA.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap main framer-motion variants with prefers-reduced-motion checks or use duration 0 if requested.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid. e.g. data-testid='post-like-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Outfit and Figtree fonts via Google Fonts and update index.css to import them.
Implement left sidebar navigation with sections (Feeds, Market, Registry, Play, Hub) grouped visually.

For the MySpace-style profile customization, create a user settings tab that allows setting CSS variables (--profile-bg, --profile-card-bg, --profile-text) applied via inline style on a .profile-theme-wrapper div.
Replace Shadcn default radii with rounded-2xl for cards and rounded-xl for inputs to match the friendly 'pet' aesthetic while maintaining professionalism.
Make the dashboard slightly larger by using max-w-[1400px] instead of standard 1200px or full fluid width on desktop.
Build the Breeder Registry with clear 'Verified Breeder' Badges visually distinct from standard users.
Use the provided real/professional images for feed posts and breeder profile mockups; avoid generic avatar placeholders where possible.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for text-heavy areas over the hero backgrounds; use a glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) card for readability.
